title: rubus argus
intro: Rubus argus, also known as the Thimble Bramble, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is used in traditional herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Rubus argus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Rubus argus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat minor cuts and scrapes, as well as to soothe digestive issues.
